summary: Verified Bug 1 (sticky PO/order_number column) fix and identified + fixed Bug 2 (screens field not being saved). Bug 1 was already fixed in Dashboard.js - all three levels (header, body, footer) have proper sticky classes. Bug 2 required a one-line fix in orders.py to include 'screens' field in order_doc.
features_tested: Bug 1 - Header sticky: 'sticky left-20 z-30 bg-zinc-900' ✅ VERIFIED
Bug 1 - Body sticky: 'sticky left-20 z-10 bg-background' ✅ VERIFIED
Bug 1 - Footer sticky: 'sticky left-20 z-20 bg-zinc-900' ✅ VERIFIED
Bug 2 - OrderCreate model has 'screens: Optional[bool]': ✅ VERIFIED (deps.py line 126)
Bug 2 - OrderCreate has 'extra=allow' in model_config: ✅ VERIFIED (deps.py line 129)
Bug 2 - POST /api/orders saves 'screens' field: ✅ FIXED (added 'screens: order.screens' to order_doc)
Frontend loads without JS errors: ✅ PASS
Dashboard table renders with orders: ✅ PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 Fix Verification: Dashboard.js correctly has sticky classes at all 3 levels:
- Header (line 635): sticky left-20 z-30 with bg-zinc-900/bg-gray-200
- Body (line 656): sticky left-20 z-10 with conditional backgrounds
- Footer (line 702): sticky left-20 z-20 with bg-zinc-900/bg-gray-200
Bug 2 Fix Applied: Added 'screens: order.screens' to order_doc in orders.py (line 65)
- The OrderCreate model had 'screens' field but it wasn't being included in the order document
- Now screens field is properly saved to MongoDB

test_credentials.note: Test user and session dynamically created and cleaned up during testing

seed_data_creation: None - used test orders that were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs are now fixed. Bug 1 (sticky column) was already fixed in previous iteration - verified working via DOM inspection. Bug 2 (screens field) required a fix in /app/backend/routers/orders.py line 65 to include 'screens: order.screens' in the order_doc dictionary. All CRUD operations for orders now properly handle the screens boolean field.
